summary: PR-V1-1 Low Risk Rollout testing complete. All acceptance criteria PASSED: (1) Legacy and v1 aliases coexist for health, system, theme, cms/pages, campaigns endpoints, (2) Route inventory contains 11 new v1 routes (675 total routes from 664), (3) Diff tool correctly reports 11 additions/0 removals, (4) No breaking changes to existing legacy routes.
passed_tests: ✅ pytest test_api_v1_low_risk_rollout.py: 2/2 passed - v1 aliases registered, inventory diff reports correct counts
✅ pytest test_api_v1_foundation.py: 3/3 passed - auth routes not duplicated, inventory has required fields
✅ GET /api/v1/system/health-dashboard: 200 OK with admin auth (v1 alias)
✅ GET /api/v1/admin/theme: 200 OK with admin auth (v1 alias)
✅ route_inventory.json exists with 675 routes (11 new v1 routes)
✅ Route diff tool reports: added=11, removed=0, new_v1=11
✅ Legacy and v1 endpoints return equivalent responses (parity tests)
✅ diff_route_inventory.py CLI works with both text and json output formats
critical_code_review_comments: v1_aliases.py: LOW_RISK_V1_ROLLOUTS correctly defines 5 router rollouts (health, health_dashboard, theme, public_cms_pages, public_campaigns)
v1_aliases.py: register_low_risk_v1_aliases() properly clones routes with _v1 suffix and avoids duplicates
v1_registry.py: Correctly mounts mobile router and then registers low-risk v1 aliases
v1_manifest.py: derive_target_path() correctly computes /api/v1/* paths from legacy routes
route_inventory.py: build_route_inventory() produces sorted, deterministic output with all required fields
route_inventory_diff.py: build_route_inventory_diff() correctly identifies added/removed routes and new v1 counts
scripts/diff_route_inventory.py: CLI properly outputs text and JSON formats

success_rate.backend: 100% (5/5 internal pytest + 19/19 HTTP endpoint tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-V1-1 Low Risk Rollout testing complete. Key validations: (1) health, system/ping, system/health-dashboard, public/theme, admin/theme, public/cms/pages, public/campaigns all have working v1 aliases, (2) route_inventory.json updated with 11 new v1 routes (675 total), (3) diff tool works correctly for detecting added v1 routes, (4) no breaking changes to legacy paths.

verification_summary.acceptance_criteria_1_dual_paths: PASSED - All low-risk routes accessible under both legacy and v1 namespaces
verification_summary.acceptance_criteria_2_route_inventory: PASSED - route_inventory.json contains 675 routes with all 11 new v1 aliases
verification_summary.acceptance_criteria_3_diff_tool: PASSED - diff tool reports 11 added v1 routes, 0 removed
verification_summary.acceptance_criteria_4_no_removals: PASSED - No legacy routes removed in this rollout
verification_summary.acceptance_criteria_5_deterministic_inve: PASSED - Inventory is sorted and deterministic
